hero.title: MARISCOS EL GÜEROLAPAS
hero.subtitle: 15 years of flavor on the streets of Puerto Vallarta

story.heading: The Story of El Güero
story.p1: Ramón Tello — better known as El Güerolapas — has been crafting seafood magic on the streets of Puerto Vallarta for over 15 years.
story.p2: What started as a humble cart became one of the city's best-kept secrets. His recipe: catch of the day, no shortcuts, and a personality that turns every customer into a friend.
story.p3: No reservations, no white tablecloths. Just real flavor, real laughs, and the best street seafood you'll ever taste.

testimonials.heading: What People Say
testimonials.t1_quote: You come for the seafood, you stay for El Güero. Best aguachile in Vallarta, no contest.
testimonials.t2_quote: First time was a friend's rec. Now I come every week. The black ceviche is a masterpiece.
testimonials.t3_quote: I found this place on a random walk. Best seafood I've had in Mexico, hands down. The owner is amazing.

location.heading: Find Us
location.description: 50 meters from the Unidad Deportiva Agustín Flores. If you can't find it, just ask for El Güero — everyone knows him.
location.hours_sunday: Sunday: Closed (even El Güero needs rest)

footer.copyright: © 2026 Mariscos El Güerolapas. Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco.

whatsapp.message: Hi Güero! I'd like to place an order.
